# Stillings Technology Group

> Managed IT services, cybersecurity, and business consulting for growing companies in San Diego, CA. Founded by Alex Stillings — 15+ years of enterprise IT experience including leadership at Twitter, SpaceX, and Vuori.

## Services

- **Managed IT Services**: Proactive monitoring, helpdesk, patch management, and on-site support for San Diego businesses
- **Cybersecurity**: Endpoint protection, email security, phishing training, and compliance documentation (HIPAA, CMMC, PCI)
- **Tech Stack Assessment & Scalability**: Infrastructure audits, growth roadmapping, vCIO advisory, vendor evaluation
- **Project-Based IT Consulting**: ITSM implementations, employee lifecycle automation, office buildouts, technology migrations
- **AI Strategy & Adoption**: AI readiness assessments, build vs. buy analysis, implementation planning
- **Networking Installations & Upgrades**: Structured cabling, wireless infrastructure, switches, firewalls, Starlink satellite internet, and network upgrades for offices and commercial spaces
- **Audio/Video Consultation**: AV system design, display and conferencing setup, and technology integration for meeting rooms and commercial environments
- **Website Development**: Business website design, development, and maintenance for small and growing companies
- **SaaS Software Setup & Support**: Onboarding, configuration, integration, and ongoing support for cloud-based business software and productivity tools

## About

Alex Stillings is the founder of Stillings Technology Group, based in Carlsbad, California. He brings over 15 years of enterprise IT experience, having led technology teams at Twitter (18 M&A integrations), SpaceX, and Vuori. He founded STG to give growing businesses access to corporate-grade IT expertise.

## Service Area

- **Primary**: Greater San Diego County (Carlsbad, North County, Downtown San Diego)
- **Extended**: Southern California, Orange County, Los Angeles
- **Remote**: Consulting and vCIO advisory available nationwide

## Technology Stack

50+ platforms including: Okta, Microsoft Entra ID, JAMF Pro, Microsoft Intune, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Jira Service Management, Moveworks, Microsoft Copilot, Zero-Trust Architecture, ITAR compliance, TS/SCI clearance (previously granted).
